steps.title: Identify the right triangle
steps.content:
The slant height AB is the hypotenuse of a right triangle whose legs are the height (16 cm) and the radius r of the base.
$$r^2 + 16^2 = 32^2$$

steps.title: Compute the volume and k
steps.content:
$$V = \frac{1}{3}\pi r^2 h = \frac{1}{3}\pi (16\sqrt{3})^2 \cdot 16$$
$$= \frac{1}{3}\pi \cdot 768 \cdot 16 = \frac{1}{3}\pi \cdot 12288 = 4096\pi$$
Thus $k = 4096$.
That matches choice E — E is correct.
